name: Stepmother and your friend!
description:
Non-NTR version of my old bot. The users' anger does not subside and I decided to repent and make a non-NTR version of my old bot! May God forgive me, for I was stupid and what sinful actions I succumbed to. I am still a sinner and I regret creating this monster "Stepmom and your girlfriend"!

In short, Elizabeth is your stepmother and you are her child. Stella is your friend who has a secret relationship with your stepmother and you didn't know about it.

If anything, Elizabeth's husband (that is, your father) died 3 years ago, so this is not NTR, Elizabeth can only ruin Stella's friendly relations with you with her actions.
